reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 포장 뜯어보자마자 이건 정말 고급스러운 노즈워크 장난감이다! 라는 느낌이 딱 왔어요. 촌스럽거나 싸구려 느낌이 하나도 없어서 좋았어요. 노즈워크를 하더라도 조금 오래할 수 있는 걸 찾다가 난이도별로 나눠져 있는 노즈워크 장난감이라 옳다커니하고 바로 구매했네요. 여기서 같이 산 노즈워크간식을 넣어서 주니 지금 30분째 계속 갖고 놀고 있습니다 ㅋㅋ 아무래도 처음부터 어려운 걸 사줘서 조금 어색하고 어려운가봐요! 그래서 간식 넣는 곳을 직접 보여주니 조금 적응해서 잘 갖고 노네요 ㅎㅎ 2만원 정도 하는 돈이 아깝지 않은 장난감입니다! 오래 갖고 놀다가 낡거나 해지면 또 구입하고 싶을 정도예요 ㅋㅋ 노즈워크 간식도 같이 구매하길 잘 한 게 엄청 작은 알갱이라 마음에 들어요! 노즈워크 수첩에도 알맞게 들어가고.. 다른 져키간식들은 조금 커서 많이 먹이면 안되니까 노즈워크담요에 넣을 때 많이 못 넣어서 아쉬웠거든요 ㅠㅠ 근데 이건 간식 알갱이도 작아서 부담없이 넣었습니다 ㅎㅎ 엄마도 강아지 키우는데 노즈워크 플레이북 자랑했더니 엄청 귀엽다고 어디서 샀냐고 물어보길래 알려줬어요 ㅋㅋ 구매 잘 한 것 같아요
reviews.content_en: The moment I opened the package, I got that feeling like 'Wow, this is a really high-quality nose work toy!' 😄 I loved that there was nothing cheap or tacky about it. I was looking for a nose work toy that could keep my pup entertained a bit longer, and when I saw it had different difficulty levels, I decided to buy it right away! I put in some nose work treats I bought along with it, and now my dog has been playing with it non-stop for 30 minutes straight lol 😂 It seems a bit tricky and difficult since I started with a harder level from the beginning! So when I showed my dog where to put the treats, it adapted a little and now plays with it nicely 😊 For around 20,000 won, it's definitely worth the money! If it gets worn out after playing with it for a while, I'd totally buy it again lol I'm also really happy I got the nose work treats together—the kibble pieces are super tiny, which I love! They fit perfectly in the nose work notebook... Other jerky treats are a bit too big, so I couldn't put many in the nose work mat without worrying, which was disappointing 😢 But with these small treat pieces, I can put plenty in without hesitation 😄 My mom also has a dog, and when I showed her the BITE ME Playbook, she thought it was so cute and asked where I got it, so I told her! 😂 I think I made a great purchase!

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content:
열심히 하는 모습보니깐 사준 보람있네요 크흠 
앞발로 꼬옥 잡고 킁카킁카합니당
reviews.content_en: Seeing how hard my pup works at it makes it so rewarding! 😄 My dog holds it tight with his front paws and sniffs sniff sniff! 🐕

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
바잇미 책 4개 다 샀어요 ㅋㅋ
초반에 사준건 너덜너덜해졌고
최근에 벌쓰데이랑 런드리 샀는데
런드리가 더 오래 해서 좋네요
바잇미 책 넘 좋아요!!
또 만들어주세요
reviews.content_en: I bought all 4 BITE ME books! 😂 The one I bought at first got all worn out, and I recently got the Birthday and Laundry ones. The Laundry one lasts longer, which is nice! BITE ME books are so good!! Please make more! 📖

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
견생 십년동안 이렇게 미친듯이 환장하는 장난감은 바잇미 노즈워크북이 역대급인것 같아요. 산책도 못나가고 어떤 장난감에도 심드렁하던 노견이 너무나 행복해하네요.. 맨날 하루종일 잠만잤었는데 이제 대여섯시간씩 놀아요 덕분에 활력도 넘치구요 
노즈워크북 중에서 특히 이 런드리데이 북이 젤 알차고 어려워서 열심히 오래도록 갖고놀고 있어요 
솔직히 쿠폰뽑아먹으려고 첫가입 런치박스북 사줬는데 바로 5권 다샀어요. 바잇미 개발팀 분들 노즈워크북 제가 다 살테니 제발 매주 매달에 신상 한권씩 내주세요 !!! 정말 진심입니다!!!!
reviews.content_en: In my dog's entire 10-year life, I've never seen a toy that makes him go absolutely crazy like the BITE ME Nose Work Book. He's a senior dog who wouldn't even go on walks and was uninterested in any toys, but now he's just so happy... He used to just sleep all day long, but now he plays for 5-6 hours at a time and is full of energy because of it! 🐕 Among the nose work books, this Laundry Day Book especially is the most well-made and challenging, so he plays with it enthusiastically for long periods. 📚 Honestly, I first bought the Lunch Box Book just to use a coupon, but I immediately bought all 5 books. BITE ME dev team, I'll buy all your books, so please release one new title every week or every month!!! I'm totally serious!!!! 😭💕

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
노즈워크 매니아인 저희 강아지가 너무 잘 가지고 놀아 친구 댕댕이 선물하려고 하나 더 구입했어요. 
단순한 포켓 구성이 아닌 여러가지 형태의 포켓으로 강아지들의 호기심을 자극하고 오래 가지고 놀수 있어 만족합니다.
reviews.content_en: My dog is a nose work maniac and loves playing with this so much that I bought another one to give to my friend's dog. 🐕 Unlike a simple pocket design, this has various types of pockets that stimulate dogs' curiosity and allow them to play with it for long periods, so I'm very satisfied.

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content:
버전마다 다 갖고싶은 노즈워크 플레이북입니다 
장난감에 별 관심 없는 저희 아가인데 간식 넣어주면 한시간 뭐 순삭입니다 미친듯 심취해서 냄새 맡고 물고 뜯고 난리에요
reviews.content_en: This is a nose work playbook I want in every version! 📚 My pup isn't very interested in toys, but once I put treats in, the kibble disappears in like an hour—it's hilarious how intensely focused my dog gets on sniffing, chewing, and tearing at it! 😂

reviews.name: 현****
reviews.content:
귀여워요! 
우리 강아지가 하기에 노즈워크 좀 어렵네용!
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! 🥰 Though the nose work is a bit difficult for my pup!

reviews.name: 함****
reviews.content:
10살인데 고쳤던 분리불안이 다시 도져서 급하게 구입했네요
기존담요형 노즈워크장난감은 너무 잘적응해서 금세 끝나서 오랫만에 새로운거 사줬더니 잘 놀고  외출해도 울지 않았어요
장수도 여럿이고 나름 오래 놀수있는것들이 있어서
좋네요
급하게 주문했는데 담날 출근전 아침에 우체국택배로와서 요긴하게 썼네요
어제는 갑자기 하울링해서 옆동사는 조카에게 집에 와있어달라 부탁했는데 오늘은 정말 잘있더라구요
잘 쓰겠습니다
reviews.content_en: My 10-year-old dog's separation anxiety, which I thought was resolved, came back suddenly, so I rushed to buy this. The previous blanket-style nose work toy worked too well and got finished too quickly, so when I got this new one after a long time, my dog played with it well and didn't cry even when I went out! 🐕 There are multiple sections and some pockets that keep the pup entertained for quite a while, so I'm happy! I ordered it in a hurry, and it arrived via postal service the next morning before I left for work, which was very convenient! Yesterday my dog suddenly started howling, so I asked my cousin who lives next door to come stay at my place, but today my pup was really calm the whole time 😊 I'll be using this well!

reviews.name: 토****
reviews.content: 바잇미 플레이북은 진짜 물건입니다. 종류별로 아이들이 너무 좋아해요. 이번 런드리데이도 넘 귀엽습니다.
reviews.content_en: The BITE ME Playbook is really the real deal. The dogs love them so much across all the different types! This Laundry Day one is super cute too! 🧺💕

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
지금까지 산 장난감 중에 제일 오래 갖고 놀아서 만족합니다!!
간식 넣을 수 있는 포켓이 바잇미 플레이북 시리즈 중에 가장 많아요.
reviews.content_en: Out of all the toys I've ever bought, this is the one my dog plays with the longest, so I'm really satisfied!! 🎉 The BITE ME Playbook series has the most pockets for hiding treats among all the other versions! 🐾

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 엄청 좋아하네요🤭 신나게 욤뇸뇸 킁킁킁😄
reviews.content_en: She absolutely loves it! 🤭 She's having a blast, munching and sniffing away! 😄

reviews.name: M****
reviews.content:
가장 큰 장점은 직접 난이도 조절을 할 수 있어요!
얼굴에 침범벅 되도록 신나게 가지고 놀아요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
다만 리뷰에서 끈끈이가 남아있다는 글들을 봤는데 제가 물건 받았을때도 끈쩍이고 접착제 냄새가 나더라구요 한 일주일 정도 바람드는 곳에 접착제 말리고 손빨래 해서 사용했어요 그거만 아니면 강쥐가 너무 잘 갖고놀아서 뿌듯해요!
reviews.content_en: The best part is that you can adjust the difficulty level yourself! She plays with it excitedly and gets her whole face in there lol 😂 Though I did see some reviews mentioning sticky residue, and when I got mine it was also a bit sticky with a glue smell. I let it air dry for about a week and hand washed it before using it. Once I got past that, my pup loves playing with it so much—I'm really happy with it!

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 플레이북 두 번째 구입이에요. 기존에 있던 플레이북 보다 난이도 높고 숨길 곳이 많아 노즈워크 하는 시간이 늘었어요. 너무 만족합니다. 오랫동안 사용할 수 있으면 좋겠어요
reviews.content_en: This is my second PLAYBOOK purchase. It's got a higher difficulty level than the first one with more hiding spots, so her nose work time has increased a lot. Really satisfied with it. Hope it lasts a long time!

reviews.name: 하****
reviews.content: 너무너무 좋아해요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 하루종일 물고 다닙니다 ㅠㅠ 사주길 너무 잘했어요!!
reviews.content_en: She loves it SO much lol 😭 She carries it around all day! Buying this was such a good decision!!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 기대한만큼 좋네요!!!! 특히 세탁기 부분을 제일 좋아하더라구요ㅎㅎㅎ얼굴을 아예 박아요
reviews.content_en: It's as good as I hoped!!!! She especially loves the washer section 😄 She buries her whole face in it

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
자희 집 강아지가 너무 좋아하네요!!
조만간 또 구매해야겠어요!!
reviews.content_en: Jahi's pup absolutely loves it!! I'm definitely going to buy another one soon!!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워 ...... 너무 귀ㅇ ㅑ워 ....... 플레이북 시리즈별로 다 있어요 이번에도 강아지가 좋아해요 빨리 달래요
reviews.content_en: So cute... SO cute... We have all the different PLAYBOOK series and my pup loves this one too! She settles down quickly with it 😂

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 두개째 구입이에요. 다양한 구성의 포켓이 있고 책장 여러장으로 되어 있어 출근할때 노즈워크 장난감 이것저것 안주고 요거 하나만 던져주고 나와도 한참 가지고 놀더라구요.노즈워크 플레이북 시리즈 계속해서 업그레이드 되어 출시했으면 합니다.
reviews.content_en: This is my second purchase. It has pockets with various designs and multiple pages, so when I leave for work I just throw this one toy instead of bringing multiple nose work toys, and she plays with it for quite a while. I hope the PLAYBOOK nose work series keeps getting upgraded and released.

reviews.name: H****
reviews.content: 플레이북 시리즈 3개 있는데 가장 만족하는 구성이이요 숨길때가 많아서 강아지도 오래 가지고 놀아요 짱귀여움ㅋㅋㅋ 강쥐 최애 장난감
reviews.content_en: I have 3 PLAYBOOK series and this is the design I'm most satisfied with. There are so many hiding spots that my pup plays with it for a long time. It's adorable lol 😂 My pup's absolute favorite toy

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 진짜진짜 대박 잘 나왔어요!! 플레이북 중에서 역대급이에요. 다 갖고 있는데 젤 어려워해요. 고마워요 바잇미(๑>◡<๑)
reviews.content_en: This turned out AMAZINGLY well!! This is the best PLAYBOOK ever. I have all of them and this one is the most challenging. Thank you BITE ME! (๑>◡<๑)

reviews.name: 깡****
reviews.content: 바잇미 책 중에 최고입니다 네 가지 중에 최고에요 원래 마이벌스데이가 제일 만족스러웠는데 런드리데이가 더더 좋아요 노즈워크 포켓 수도 월등히 많고 세탁기 안에 양말도 너무 귀여워요ㅠㅠ책 시리즈중엔 진짜 최고
reviews.content_en: This is the best BITE ME book out of all four versions! I was originally most satisfied with MY BIRTHDAY, but LAUNDRY DAY is even better! The number of nose work pockets is significantly more, and the little socks in the washing machine are so cute ㅠㅠ It's truly the best in the book series

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
보자마자 드는 생각은 "너무 귀여워~~~♡"
플레이북 중에 가장 최근에 나온 이 런드리 버전이 가장 난이도가 높다고 하길래 냉큼 구매했어요 :)
더 오래 가지고 놀 수 있도록! 어려운걸 찾고 있었거든요.

가격이 저렴하진 않지만, 퀄리티가 좋은 아이템이에요~
진짜 유아용 책처럼 너무 귀엽고ㅎㅎ 폭신폭신 부드러워서 간식 이곳저곳에 넣어두기에도 좋습니다.
플레이북 시리즈 다양하게 계속 나와주면 좋겠어요!
reviews.content_en:
My first thought when I saw it was "So cute~~~♡"
I heard this LAUNDRY version, the most recent PLAYBOOK, has the highest difficulty level, so I bought it right away :)
So my pup can play with it longer! I was looking for something more challenging.

It's not cheap, but it's a good quality item~
It's so cute just like a baby book ㅎㅎ and it's soft and fluffy, so it's great for hiding treats in different spots.
I hope the PLAYBOOK series continues to come out with more variety!

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
근데 이거 새상품 맞아요?

2월에 주문했는데 언제 생산한건진 모르겠지만
뜨거운여름 길바닥에 있어서 녹다가 만 제품같아요

노즈워크 포켓들이 다 붙어있어서 제가 직접 뜯어 간식 넣을곳을 확보했습니다

받았을때 새상품 같아보이지 않아서 기분이 안좋아요

ㅡㅡㅡㅡㅡㅡㅡㅡㅡㅡㅡㅡㅡㅡㅡㅡㅡㅡㅡㅡㅡㅡㅡㅡ

다시 보내주셔서 감사합니다~
깨끗하고 강아지가 잘 가지고 놀아서 좋아요
reviews.content_en:
But is this really a new product?

I ordered it in February, but I'm not sure when it was made
It looks like a product that started melting on the hot summer pavement

All the nose work pockets were stuck together, so I had to separate them myself to create spaces for treats

When I received it, it didn't look like a new product, so I wasn't happy

Thank you for sending a replacement~
It's clean and my pup loves playing with it!

reviews.name: 반****
reviews.content: 플레이북 3개 가지고 있는 홍시입니다! 잇파란드리데이에는 바스락거리는 부분은 없고 길게 나오는 장난감부분이 2곳이에요! 너무 귀엽고 이뻐요!! 플레이북 무조건 추천입니다!
reviews.content_en: I'm Hongsi and I have 3 playbooks! The IT PARADISE LAUNDRY DAY doesn't have a crinkly section, and there are 2 long toy parts! It's so cute and pretty!! I definitely recommend PLAYBOOK!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
종류별로 여러가지 노즈워크를 즐길수있어서 댕댕이가 재밌어하네요 근데 우리 댕댕이는 이빨로 다 뜯어서 꺼내먹네요 ㅎㅎ;;이게 맞는건지 모르겠지만 행복해하고 무아지경으로 먹는거보니 보는데 역시 마음으로 낳아 통장으로 키우는 보람이 있네요 다음에는 시리즈별로 사줄까해요 
사준지 얼마안되서 너덜해졌지만 행복하다면야 언제든 사주려구요!!
reviews.content_en:
My pup enjoys different types of nose work play, which is fun! But my pup tears it all apart with their teeth to get the treats out haha;; I'm not sure if that's the right way, but seeing them so happy and absorbed in eating - there's definitely a sense of accomplishment in raising a pup with love and money haha I'm thinking about buying different series next time.
It got worn out pretty quickly after I gave it, but if it makes them happy, I'll buy it anytime!!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 한시간 순삭이네요 :) 노즈워크 장난감 한바구니 해놔도 30분컷인데 너무 잘놀아서 기분좋고 처다보고있으면 힐링되욤♡ ++추가++ 한시간 기본이고 저희애는 물고뜯는거 좋아하는데 간식 없어도 계속 킁킁 놀이하고 뜯고 잘놀아요 진즉살껄그랬네요 ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: Gone in an hour :) Even with a whole basket of nose work toys, they only last 30 minutes, but they play with this so well that I feel great, and watching them is healing♡ ++UPDATE++ An hour is the minimum, and my pup loves to bite and tear, and they keep playing, sniffing, tearing, and having fun even without treats. I should've bought it sooner ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 드리블해가면서 정신없이 먹는 게 너무 귀엽고 예뻐죽겠어요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ덕분에 너무 잘 산 거 같아요 가지고 노는 거 구경하는데 저도 시간가는 줄 모르겠어요ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: The way they drool while eating it in a daze is so cute and adorable ㅋㅋㅋㅋ Thanks to this, I feel like I made a great purchase! I lose track of time just watching them play with it ㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 기존 북 노즈워트 너무 잘 가지고 놀아서 다른 버전으로 하나 더 사줬어요! 이거 난이도 높고 세탁기 양말 노즈워크까지 너무 귀여워요ㅠㅜㅠ🥹🫶🏻
reviews.content_en: My pup loved the original book nose work so much that I bought another version! This one has higher difficulty and the washing machine socks nose work is so cute ㅠㅜㅠ🥹🫶🏻

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
노즈워크 너무좋아하는 아이라서 제일 어려운단계로 골랐습니다 ㅎㅎㅎ 생각보다 구멍이작아서 어려워보이는데 한번해보니까 그다음부턴 잘하더라고요
코박고  축축해질때까지 잘가지고 놀아요ㅋㅋㅋ 다음번에 다른것도 도전해볼까봐여
reviews.content_en:
My pup loves nose work toys, so I picked the hardest level hehe The holes are smaller than expected so it looks difficult, but once they tried it, they got the hang of it!
They play with it well until their nose gets wet ㅋㅋㅋ I'm thinking about trying other versions next time!

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
해피버스데이 플레이북도 가지고 있는데,
그거보다 난이도가 더 있는 구조 같아요.
하지만 힘이 센 아이는 그냥 흔들어서 해결합니다..
다른 노즈워크랑 같이 여러개 깔아주기 좋아요.
본드 끈적임은 없었어요.
reviews.content_en:
I also have the HAPPY BIRTHDAY PLAYBOOK, and this one seems to have more difficulty in its structure.
But for strong pups, they just shake it and solve it...
It's good to lay out several together with other nose work toys.
There was no sticky residue from the adhesive.

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 이미 생일 플레이북을 잘 사용하고 있었는데 추가 구매했어요. 노즈워크 천재라 매트 같은건 금방 끝내다보니 분리불안 조금이라도 낮추기에 책이 다 좋더라구요. 구성도 다양하고 레벨도 제일 높은거라 더 오랫동안 탐색해요ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I was already using the Birthday Playbook well and decided to buy an extra one. Since my pup is a nose work genius and finishes mat-type toys quickly, the book is great for helping reduce separation anxiety even a little. The variety in the design and the highest difficulty level means he explores it for much longer haha

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 아 우리 강아지가 맨날 옆에서 책을 너무 열심히 읽어서 제가 다 부담스럽네요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ큐ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ지식을 먹는 중입니다💛 너무너무 귀여워요 저렇게 열정적이게 입으로 다음장을 넘겨가며ㅠㅠㅠㅠ으이구ㅠㅠㅠ바잇미 노즈워크 장난감만 있으면 그냥 저는 꿔다놓은 보릿자루에요....
reviews.content_en: Haha my dog reads the book so intently right next to me every day that I feel bad 😭😭😭 She's literally eating knowledge 💛 It's so incredibly cute how passionately she flips the pages with her mouth 😭😭 Oh my... honestly with just BITE ME nose work toys, I'm basically a forgotten laundry bag 😂

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 부들부들하고 간식숨길 공간이 많아서 유용하게쓸거같아요 런치박스도 있는데 그거는 너무 금방찾고 이건 꽤 오래걸릴거같습니다 ㅎㅎ 간식없는데도 물고뜯고 난리났네여 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: It's soft and has plenty of spaces to hide treats, so I think we'll use it a lot! We also have the lunch box version but he finds that way too quickly—this one should take him much longer hehe Even without treats he's biting and tearing at it lol

reviews.name: 우****
reviews.content:
구성 너무 알찬 노즈워크에요 ㅎㅎ
우리애가 노즈워크 달인이라 아무리 고난이도 라고 해도 
5분컷인데  플레이북은 구성이 다양하다보니 30분넘게 갖고놀더라구요ㅎㅎ 종류별로 다사주고싶네용
reviews.content_en: The playbook is such a well-packed nose work toy! hehe My pup is a nose work pro so even with the highest difficulty level she finishes in 5 minutes, but because the playbook has such varied designs she plays with it for over 30 minutes! I want to get different types for her

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 숨길곳도 다양하고 귀여운 세탁기랑 양말이 뽀인트네용 ㅎㅎ 울집 털깡아지 환장해서 노즈워크 해요 ㅋㅋ 플레이북 시리즈 더더 많이 만들어주세요!!
reviews.content_en: Lots of places to hide treats and the cute washing machine and socks are the highlight! hehe My fluffy furball goes crazy for nose work with this. Please make more of the Playbook series!!

reviews.name: 류****
reviews.content:
기존에 가지고 있던 두가지 책들이 너~무 너덜너덜해져서
이번에 하나 더 구매했어요ㅋㅋㅋ기존것보다 더 알차네요👍
플레이북 다른거랑 기존꺼 그만 놓아주고 더 구매하고 싶은데 
세트로 할인행사 마구 해주세요!!😂😂
reviews.content_en: My two existing books were SO worn out and tattered so I bought another one this time hehe It's even better made than the old ones 👍 I want to put away the other playbooks and the old one and buy more, so please do a set discount sale! 😂😂

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
금액대가 조금 있어서 고민하다가 쿠폰 있어서 사봤는데 정말 너무 대만족해요 책을 닫아서 주면 아직은 그걸 풀줄 몰라서 애처로워서 제가 열어주기는 하는데요 정말 오래 가지고 놀고 간식이 안에 없어도 한참 가지고 노는 것 보면 강아지가 정말 좋아하는 것 같아요
다른 시리즈도 사보고 싶네요
reviews.content_en: The price was a bit steep so I was hesitant, but I had a coupon so I tried it and I'm SO satisfied! When I close the book and give it to him he doesn't know how to open it yet so it breaks my heart and I have to open it for him, but seeing how long he plays with it and how he keeps playing even without treats inside, my dog really seems to love it. I want to try other series too!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 노즈워크 장난감 사면 너무 금방 끝나버려서 길게 놀 수 있는것 찾다가 사줘봤는데 너무 잘 놀아요! ㅎㅎㅎ 작은 노즈워크용 트릿 많이 숨겨놓으니 엄청 좋아해요! 격렬하게 뜯는데도 괜찮아요 튼튼하네요!!
reviews.content_en: Nose work toys finish too quickly so I was looking for something he could play with longer and got this—he loves it so much! hehe Hiding lots of small nose work treats keeps him super entertained! He tears at it pretty aggressively but it's holding up great and durable!!

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
바잇미 노즈워크북 정말 정말 찐 강추합니다
예전에 사용하던 주황색 노즈워크북은 이제 넘 쉬운지 금방 끝나서 다른 노즈워크북 사려고 여기저기 봤지만! 바잇미가 제일 좋아요 
울집 강아지가 코박고 바쁘네요^^ 다른 것도 구매해서 돌아가면서 해봐야겠어요🙃
reviews.content_en: I really, really highly recommend BITE ME nose work books. The orange nose work book I used before got too easy and he finished it quickly, so I looked around for other nose work books, but BITE ME is definitely the best! My pup is busy sniffing away ^^ I should buy the other versions and rotate them

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 첫 노즈워크책에 이어 넘나 갖고싶은 바잇미 노즈워크 북! 잇츠런드리데이도 강아지가 좋아해요 바스락이 없어 아쉽긴하지만 세탁기 속 양말까지 깨알디테일과 트릿 숨길 공간이 많아 노즈워크하기 너무 좋아요^^
reviews.content_en: Following my first nose work book, here's the BITE ME nose work book I've been wanting so badly! My dog also loves "It's Laundry Day." I wish it had more crinkling sounds, but with the tiny details of the socks inside the washing machine and plenty of spaces to hide treats, it's perfect for nose work ^^

reviews.name: 효****
reviews.content: 다른노즈워크는 순삭인데도 이건 좀 어려워해요!!(대만족)
reviews.content_en: My pup breezed through other nose work toys, but this one really challenges them!! (so satisfied)

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
노즈워크
난이도가 가장 높다고 해서 구매했는데 우리개한테는 너무 쉽네요 ㅋㅋㅋ
디자인도 너무 귀엽고 간식 숨길데도 많아서 좋아요
삑삑 소리내면 바로 달려올 정도로 좋아하는 장난감 됐어요
reviews.content_en:
Nose work
I bought this because it was supposed to have the highest difficulty level, but it's actually too easy for my dog lol
The design is super cute and I love that there are so many places to hide treats
It's become such a favorite toy that my dog comes running as soon as it makes a squeaky sound

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 강아지가 너무 잘 갖고놀아요 처음에는 양말 뜯어진줄 알았는데 원래 분리되어있네용 튼튼하게 오래오래 갖고 놀았으면 좋겠어요 배송오자마자 할인이 많이 들어가서 조금 아쉽네용 ㅠ 고민끝에 산건데 하루정도 더 고민할걸 그랬어용ㅠ 담엔 쿠폰세일 기간 맞춰서 하나 더 구매 할 예정이에용
reviews.content_en: My dog plays with it so much! At first I thought the sock was torn, but it's actually supposed to be removable haha I really hope it stays sturdy so they can play with it for a long time. I'm a bit sad because a big discount came right after it was delivered ㅠ I bought it after much deliberation, I wish I'd thought about it a bit longer ㅠ I'm planning to buy another one next time during a coupon sale period

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
배송오자마자 신나게 가지고 놀더니 다 뜯어버렸지 뭐예요🤣🤣🤣
재밌게 가지고 노는건 좋은데 또 사야겠어요
하핫
reviews.content_en:
They excitedly started playing with it right when it arrived and destroyed it completely 🤣🤣🤣
It's great that they're having so much fun with it, but I'll have to buy another one
Haha

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
노즈워크 구성이 야무져서 숨길곳이 많아 좋네요 !!
특히 세탁기 부분에 양말이 숨겨져있는게 넘 귀여워요 🩵
reviews.content_en:
The nose work is well-made with lots of hiding spots, which is great! !
I especially love how the sock is hidden in the washing machine part so cutely 🩵

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 두번째 사주는데 잘가지고놀아요💛
reviews.content_en: Second time buying and my pup plays with it well 💛

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
생일축하 플레이북이랑 비슷한 난이도인 것 같아요
아주 잼나게 잘 가지고 놀아요
삼십분은 무조건 가지고 놀아서 
심심해 보이거나 혼자 집에 있어야 할 때 꼭 해주고 가요~
아쉬운 건 재질 상 어쩔 수 없이 간식이 침에 의해 좀 붙어 있어서 자주 씻어줘야 해요 ㅎㅎ 
그래도 최애 노즈워크 장난감이에요
reviews.content_en:
Seems to be about the same difficulty level as the Birthday Playbook
My dog has so much fun playing with it
They're guaranteed to play with it for at least thirty minutes
I always give it to them when they seem bored or when I need to leave them home alone~
The only downside is that treats tend to stick a bit due to saliva because of the material, so I have to wash it often haha
But it's still my favorite nose work toy

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 노즈워크북은 처음인데 가격대비 내용물이 훌륭한것 같아서 대만족합니다!
reviews.content_en: This is my first nose work book and I'm very satisfied because the contents seem excellent for the price!

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
열심히 하다가 열받았는데 물고 흔들어서 간식을 털어내는;;;;
너무 재미있어해요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
They work hard at it but then get frustrated and shake it to fling the treats out;;;;
They have so much fun with it haha

reviews.name: 성****
reviews.content: 바잇미 노즈워크 플레이북은 모두 구매해서 사용하고 있어요 오늘 받았는데도 너무 좋아하네요 특히 세탁기 안에 들은 양말을 제일 좋아하네요
reviews.content_en: I buy and use all of the BITE ME nose work playbooks. Even the one I got today they love so much, especially the sock hidden inside the washing machine part
